title: Taco Bell Mace
description:
Turns the mace into a 3D model of the Taco Bell logo in which you can beat people senseless with. 
(Sound-Effects Included)
body:
Turns the mace into a 3D model of the Taco Bell logo as well as playing the iconic sfx when landing a falling hit on an enemy.

![Violence](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9f9f26d98b6a34624c93a3fd199c8724db70931_0.webp)

## I can be trusted with heavy metal objects I promise.
- Model and Textures by gluet2
- Sounds sourced by Deltaxe
